Class GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend<E>

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.client.client.technical.backend.math.GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend<E>
Type Parameters:
E - The element type (typically Real for network transfer)
All Implemented Interfaces:
LinearAlgebraProvider<E>, AlgorithmProvider
public class GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend<E> extends Object implements LinearAlgebraProvider<E>
A LinearAlgebraProvider that offloads operations to a remote gRPC service.

This provider enables distributed computing by delegating matrix and vector operations to a remote server. Useful for:

  • Offloading heavy computations to powerful servers
  • Utilizing GPU clusters remotely
  • Collaborative scientific computing

Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Constructor Details

    • GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend

      public GRPCLinearAlgebraBackend(String host, int port, Field<E> field)
      Creates a gRPC provider connected to the specified server.
      Parameters:
      host - Server hostname or IP
      port - Server port
      field - The field for element operations
